rag_rules: Latched expressions must appear only in component implementations, not in component type contracts
Binary 'and' expressions require boolean types on both sides; fix type mismatches by ensuring expressions evaluate to bool
generic_rules: AGREE guarantees and assumptions must reference only visible identifiers or locally declared helpers
AGREE type declarations must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
Validator diagnostics pointing to '<error>' types indicate unresolved references that must be fixed at the source
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are scoped to component type or implementation annexes based on the level of binding
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared equations in AGREE contracts to avoid type resolution errors
anti_patterns: Do not place latched expressions in component type annexes; they are only valid in implementations
Do not mix invalid or unresolved identifiers in binary expressions; ensure all operands are properly typed
